model_specification_line: point_estimate, standard_error, sample_size = fit_did_lpm(df, outcome_col="full_time", treatment_col="eligible", post_col="post_daca", weight_col="perwt")
sample_selection: birthyr is not None and yrimmig is not None and age is not None
treatment_definition: birthyr >= 1982 and yrimmig <= 2007 and 0 <= yrimmig - birthyr < 16
